name: Honey Care to Take a Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the yogurt in a small bowl with the rest of the ingredients.
2. Mix well until all components are thoroughly combined.
3. Serve with sliced fruit.
Makes 2 1/4 cups.
Src: American Bee Journal
January 1996
If you have kids, here's a good way to have a healthy & fun 'sweet'
after dinner.
Sam in Kinburn, Ont.
